name: Quasifuchsian deformation of (2,3,7) group
description: Continuous deformation of the Fuchsian {7,3} group toward a Kleinian group

deformationSpace.name: Teichmüller space T(S)
deformationSpace.deformationParameter: Beltrami differential μ on S = H²/Γ

bending.description: Bending deformation: move the surface in ℍ³ (hyperbolic 3-space)
bending.bendingMeasure: A measured lamination on the convex core boundary

effect.fuchsian: t=0: limit set is the circle S¹
effect.quasifuchsian: 0<t<1: limit set is a fractal Jordan curve (quasicircle)
effect.kleinian: t=1 (boundary): limit set becomes non-Jordan, group becomes Kleinian

animationParameters.note: Shader animates along a path in Teichmüller space

limitSetEvolution.t05: Mildly deformed quasicircle (Jordan curve, fractal dimension > 1)
limitSetEvolution.t09: Heavily deformed quasicircle approaching parabolic limit

weilPeterssonMetric.description: The Weil-Petersson metric on Teichmüller space measures the deformation
weilPeterssonMetric.formula: WP inner product: (μ, ν) = ∫_S μ·ν̄ · λ² dA
weilPeterssonMetric.geodesic: The bending deformation follows a Weil-Petersson geodesic

visualAppearance.fuchsian: Clean tiling, crisp edges, perfect circular boundary
visualAppearance.quasifuchsian: Distorted tiling, wavy edges, fractal boundary
